headline: Carnival Earnings Are a Big Test for the Cruise Stocks Rally
summary: Cruise stocks have been on a tear recently, boosted by tumbling oil prices and hopes of an end to the Iran war.

headline: Carnival Earnings Due. Will Record Booking Trends Outpace Fuel Costs?
summary: Carnival's Q2 earnings on Tuesday are expected to detail booking momentum, fuel cost impact. CCL's stock performance trails this rival.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Royal Caribbean Group, Raises Price Target to $361
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE:RCL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $360 to $361.

headline: 1 Surging  Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: The stocks featured in this article are seeing some big returns. Over the past month, they’ve outpaced the market due to some combination of positive news, upbeat results, or supportive macro developments. As such, investors are taking notice and bidding up shares.
